pytorch_module_inspection.dropout_eval_behavior: proj_drop and attn_drop are Dropout(0.0) in this config; eval mode disables dropout randomness.

offset_branch: DepthwiseConv2D kernel 5 stride 1 padding same, mapped from grouped Conv2d
sampling: offset * manu_offset + reference for grid coordinates
manual_bilinear_grid_sample_nhwc for sampling features and RPE bias
tf_module_structure.attention: scaled dot-product multi-head attention with groups and relative position bias

random_module_input.reason: keeps the synthetic block input near observed captured DAttention tensor scale while still using deterministic random values

captured_random_image_input.distribution: numpy uniform [0, 1) RGB image with ImageNet mean/std preprocessing

real_image_input.preprocessing: PIL bilinear resize to 224x224, RGB [0,1], ImageNet mean/std normalization
